title: REAP Forum: Winterize Your Home Efficiently – Nov 10
summary: Get your home ready for winter! Join Michelle Wilber, REAP’s Energy Efficiency Coordinator, for REAP’s Forum “Winterizing Your Home: Energy Efficiency Tips for Cutting Energy Bills” on November 10, 2010 at the Anchorage Museum, 6 pm. title: A Veteran’s Perspective on the Arctic Refuge – Nov 10
summary: A VETERAN’S PERSPECTIVE ON THE ARCTIC REFUGE is the topic for the Northern Voices Lecture from 7 to 8:30pm at the Noel Wien Public Library (1215 Cowles St.) in Fairbanks on November 10th. title: NAEC Auction Celebrating 50 Wild Years of Arctic Refuge – Nov 6
summary: Get your bids ready! The Northern Alaska Environmental Center (NAEC) Annual Auction is being held on Saturday, November 6th at the Princess Hotel in Fairbanks.
